description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop with real historical data for SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). A swing trader needs a specific chart setup to monitor long-term trends while trading on a daily timeframe. Create a single chart for 'SPY' using 'Daily' bars that includes a 'Weekly' bars data series overlay. Add a 50-period 'SMA' (Simple Moving Average) indicator configured to use the 'Weekly' data series as its 'Input Series'. Save the workspace to ensure the configuration persists. Login credentials (if needed): Docker / GymAnything123!
